objects.description: [BRICKSTORM](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S9015) has leveraged Base64 to encode C2 communications.(Citation: NVISO BRICKSTORM April 2025)(Citation: Resecurity UNC5221 BRICKSTORM F5 Big-IP October 2025)
